name: Metro Plus
description_short: Metro Plus Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative in the Bluegrass region offering auto loans, mortgages, home equity products, and credit cards with competitive rates.
description_long:
Metro Plus Credit Union is a federally-insured, member-owned credit union serving the Bluegrass region (Kentucky area based on website language). The credit union recently underwent a rebranding evolution and held a grand opening event for a new main office in April. As a not-for-profit cooperative, Metro Plus operates under the NCUA regulatory framework and prioritizes member benefits over shareholder profits.

Metro Plus offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including auto loans (as low as 5.79% APR on used vehicles), home mortgage loans, fixed-rate home equity loans, home equity lines of credit (HELOC), personal loans, VISA credit cards (as low as 7.90% APR), money market accounts (up to 1.76% APY), and share certificates (up to 2.89% APY). The credit union also provides online banking, ATM access through the CO-OP shared network, check reordering, and loan pre-qualification tools. A standout offering is their Auto Advisors service, a free VIP car-buying experience for members that includes trade-in evaluation, dealer incentive research, financing negotiation, and a haggle-free purchasing process.

Metro Plus differentiates itself through member-centric services beyond traditional lending. The Auto Advisors program eliminates car-buying friction for members, while their Financial Wellness Portal provides educational tools for money management. Promotional offerings include limited-time auto loan incentives (2.00% APR discount plus 90-day payment deferral) and specialized loan products like vacation loans. The credit union emphasizes local presence with multiple branch locations and hours transparency, plus holiday schedule visibility.

As a credit union, Metro Plus is best suited for individuals seeking member-owned banking with competitive rates and personalized service. However, membership eligibility requirements (not detailed on homepage) may restrict access compared to banks. The promotional rates and terms displayed are time-limited, and specific APR/APY rates shown are minimums that vary by creditworthiness and product terms.
services: Auto loans (used vehicles as low as 5.79% APR with promotional discounts)
VISA credit cards (as low as 7.90% APR)
Share savings accounts and share certificates (up to 2.89% APY)
Auto Advisors car-buying service (free for members)
CO-OP ATM and shared branch network access
pros: Auto Advisors service provides free professional car-buying assistance with negotiation and dealer incentive research for members
Competitive auto loan rates starting at 5.79% APR on used vehicles with promotional discounts available
Home equity products (fixed-rate loans and HELOC) for debt consolidation, remodeling, and major purchases
Member-owned credit union structure means profits support member benefits rather than external shareholders
CO-OP shared branch and ATM network access for extended location availability beyond physical branches
Share certificates up to 2.89% APY and money market accounts up to 1.76% APY for savings products
Online banking platform with loan calculators and savings tools for financial planning
cons: Membership eligibility requirements not disclosed on website—credit unions typically have field-of-membership restrictions
Promotional rates (2.00% APR off, 90-day payment deferral) are explicitly time-limited with unclear expiration dates
Displayed APR/APY rates are minimums and require qualifying credit; actual rates depend on creditworthiness
Limited information on personal loan products—rates, terms, and maximum loan amounts not specified
No details provided about membership fees, minimum balance requirements, or account maintenance costs
best_for: Vehicle buyers seeking professional negotiation assistance and competitive auto loan rates through a member-owned lender
Homeowners interested in tapping home equity for debt consolidation or major projects with fixed-rate options
Bluegrass region residents looking for local relationship banking with multiple branch locations
Credit union members seeking a full-service financial institution with savings, lending, and educational resources
diagnosis: Metro Plus is best for credit union-eligible consumers in Kentucky seeking competitive rates on auto loans and home equity products, particularly those interested in the free Auto Advisors car-buying service. The main caveat is that membership eligibility is restricted to specific fields-of-membership, and displayed rates are promotional minimums requiring good credit—actual rates will vary by individual creditworthiness.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.

meta_description: Metro Plus — NCUA-insured credit union in Lexington, KY. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
